header.chooseProduct: Pick a product to get started

footer.tagline: Your technology partner for getting things done — from custom systems and web apps to on-site integration, we turn ideas into software that runs reliably in the real world.

partners.subtitle: Backed by the world's leading technology partners.

hero.badge: Your technology partner for real-world business
hero.lead: Government projects, enterprise transformation, on-site O2O integration — we don't just write code. We know how to make systems run reliably in the real world.

services.title: Full-Stack Digital Solutions
services.subtitle: From development to on-site integration, we deliver everything you need to turn an idea into a system that works.
services.ctaCardDesc: Tell us what you need and our consultants will help you find direction and check feasibility.

ai.subtitle: From generative-AI customer service to smart lead generation, we turn the latest AI into products that are genuinely useful — and that deliver results.

products.title: Our Products
products.subtitle: Beyond custom builds, we develop our own SaaS products — from e-commerce to AI customer service and smart lead generation — to help businesses level up across the board.

insights.title: Insights
insights.subtitle: Stay ahead with hands-on takes on security, architecture, AI and the trends shaping the industry.

process.title: How We Work
process.subtitle: Four clear steps — from the first conversation to long-term operations, we're with you the whole way.

cta.title: Got an idea and need someone to build it with?
cta.subtitle: New build, upgrade, or on-site integration — let's talk. We'll assess your project for free.

seo.title: JWisdom｜AIoT Experts · Software Development & System Integration
seo.ogTitle: JWisdom｜Your Technology Partner for Real-World Business
seo.desc: JWisdom is your technology partner for real-world business — software development, web and app design, government and education systems, AI integration and digital marketing. We turn ideas into systems that run reliably.

products.name: IoT Shop
products.desc: A one-stop shop for maker and IoT components — Raspberry Pi, Arduino, ESP, Jetson, sensors and modules — covering everything from prototyping to mass production.

products.name: ChatAI Realistic CS
products.desc: A lifelike AI customer-service platform across LINE and other channels, with 24/7 replies, bookings and lead management — so your service never sleeps.

products.name: AutoGrowth
products.desc: An AI-powered growth engine: auto-generated short videos, review and reputation management, hot-lead scoring and automated follow-ups — turning traffic into repeat customers.

why.title: Strategy First
why.desc: We get clear on your goals and use cases before picking the tech — so we never build something no one uses.

why.title: Solid Engineering
why.desc: A full-stack in-house team across front-end, back-end, cloud and AI. No outsourcing, no bottlenecks.

why.title: Built for the Real World
why.desc: We know what it takes on the ground, so your system runs reliably and stays easy to maintain.

why.title: In It for the Long Haul
why.desc: After launch we stick around — from operations to optimization, we help your system grow.

process.title: Discovery
process.desc: We dig into your goals, use cases and pain points, and assess feasibility for free.

process.title: Planning & Design
process.desc: We map out the architecture, workflows and interface, then build once direction and timeline are set.

process.title: Development
process.desc: Agile, iterative, and transparent — check progress anytime, and we ship on schedule.

process.title: Operations & Optimization
process.desc: Launch isn't the finish line. We keep monitoring, maintaining and improving alongside you.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.seoDesc: JWisdom FAQ: our process, quotes and engagement, technical operations and more.

403.title: Access Denied
403.desc: You don't have permission to view this page.

404.title: Page Not Found
404.desc: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

419.title: Session Expired
419.desc: This page has expired. Please refresh and try again.

429.title: Too Many Requests
429.desc: Please wait a moment and try again.

500.title: Server Error
500.desc: Something went wrong on our end. We're on it.

503.title: Under Maintenance
503.desc: We're doing some maintenance. Please check back soon.

contact.seoDesc: Get in touch with JWisdom — software development, system integration, AI applications and digital transformation. Leave your details and a consultant will get back to you soon.
contact.ogDesc: Get in touch with JWisdom — software development, system integration, AI applications and digital transformation.
contact.title: Contact
contact.lead: Your technology partner for getting things done. New build, upgrade, or on-site integration — leave your details and our consultants will get back to you with a free assessment and recommendations.
contact.infoSubtitle: Reach us through any of the channels below, or just fill out the form.
